title: BASHUO Kids Ultrasonic Electric Toothbrush, 6 Gear Speed Mode IPX7 for Sensitive Teeth 360° Oral Cleaning U Shaped Toothbrush for Children Toddler 2-7 Years Old (Pink)
features: 【KIDS ELECTRIC TOOTHBRUSH】U-Shaped Toothbrush for Kids adopts a cute cartoon design, has 6 different tooth brushing modes, scientifically shakes for 45 seconds, and protects the dental health of children aged 2-7. The silicone head design allows children to develop the correct way of brushing without manual adjustment, making brushing a habit for children and enjoying the fun of brushing.

【Material safety and security】U shaped soft silicone brush head, medical food-grade liquid silicone material is environmentally friendly and hygienic, transparent, odorless, tough and durable, and food-grade bristles will not hurt the gums.

【45° Ultrasonic Toothbrushes】The professional scientific design of kids electric toothbrush,We have passed tens of thousands of simulated dental cleaning tests: 45° brushing with LED cold blue light low-frequency wave cleaning, 45 seconds of smart scientific timing to care for the toddler's teeth. The Technique is safe to protect oral health by redox reaction with pigment.

【MULTIFUNCTIONAL MODES】Six different smart cleaning modes，Which can satisfy that all teeth are covered, sound waves clean teeth 5000-15000 times/min, different frequencies, diverse and powerful, care for oral health, clean stubborn tooth stains, whiten teeth, also suitable for sensitive gums, and promote around the gums Gum blood circulation. It is equipped with 400mAh battery, It can be used for 400 hours each time with USB charging once every half month. Perfect for daily use and travel.

【IPX7 waterproof】With IPX7 professional waterproof technology,Toddler can brush their teeth while bathing. USAGE TIPS - This toothbrush should be used with foam toothpaste. When brushing your teeth, please move left and right while adjusting the up and down angle to achieve the best cleaning effect. Replace the brushing head every 2-3 months to Keep the brush head in good condition. Keep the toothbrush body dry while charging and its working time should be less than 10 mins.

reviews.title: Great for little boys who don’t brush well
reviews.text: My son is horrible at brushing his teeth. He does it often, just has a hard time getting every crevice. He shakes this around back and fourth while in his mouth and gets them nice and clean. 10/10 would recommend.

reviews.title: Way too small…
reviews.text: Way smaller than I had hoped for. Tiny toothbrushes the toothbrushes looks like they’ve been cut in half. That would have been fine but the toothbrush head is so tiny, I appreciate that these are compostable but I just feel like this could have been done better. The packaging seems great, however these arrived in a plastic Amazon bag, so it sort cancel’s out the intention. So I’m a little disappointed and will unfortunately bring my plastic traveling toothbrush just incase this one doesn’t work for me. So tiny for a 6 day trip! I won’t use the pills, I just bought these for the compostable toothbrushes, so I can’t really comment on those.

reviews.title: Gross!
reviews.text:
The toothpaste foams good and seems ok but after my toddler spit it out upon first entering her mouth and making the “lemon face” I tried it too.
The watermelon is SO gross. The strawberry is a tiny bit better. I could manage to make myself use the strawberry but toddlers are not going to make themselves brush their teeth with nasty flavored stuff.

title: RADIUS - Source Toothbrush, Replacement-Head Technology and a Handle Made from Repurposed Materials, Colors May Vary (Super Soft, 1 Count)

reviews.title: Very soft and gentle
reviews.text: Really like this soft, gentle toothbrush. The broad head reaches better and the softer bristles feel less damaging and irritating. Like that the heads are replaceable so there's not as much plastic waste.

Elevating the mundane.

reviews.title: Adorable toothbrush and great teether as well but pricey
reviews.text:
This toothbrush/teether is BPA free and made of soft silicone. The head of the cute bear prevents the toothbrush piece from going too far into the baby's mouth but it is still long enough to act as a teether and also massage the gums. Babies usually do not start getting teeth until about 6 months so it can help the child get used to the first steps of "brushing their teeth." The current price of $12.99 ($15.99 minus $3) is a bit pricey for this.

Always supervise during use and be careful to clean this regularly. Because the brush area is grooved, it is important to give this a vigorous cleaning in that area as food, lint, etc. can get caught in that area depending on where the baby puts it.

reviews.title: Convenient, choke-proof baby toothbrush and teether
reviews.text: The whole thing is designed so that baby can't choke on it no matter which part she puts in her mouth.  The whole 'handle' is bendy silicone, which she also likes as a teether.  The wide bear head makes it easy for her to grab and hold onto it.  The brush is on all sides that you don't have to keep turning it around to get both upper and lower teeth, and still goes in enough to brush her tongue and gums.  It's all about the convenience.

reviews.title: Baby toothbrush
reviews.text: Baby now has two adorable teeth and we just started using this toothbrush before bed every night. Not sure how this is supposed to work because we don’t use toothpaste but he laughs and laughs so we love using it. It’s such a cute part of his bedtime routine and as he gets older he will hopefully have a great association with brushing his teeth and dental hygiene because of this

reviews.title: It was a gift
reviews.text: It was a gift to my nieces son. She said he loves it. He’s only 6 months but it’s never too early to teach. She said he won’t let it go.

reviews.title: Well designed kids toothbrush
reviews.text: Very useful toothbrush. I got it for my 8 month old who already has a few teeth. I love the design. It is relatively large, which makes it easier to my baby to hold and shew in. Since the brush is round, it works from all angles. I highly recommend it.

reviews.title: Nice looking compact carrier
reviews.text: I actually had to send this product back.  The product too too long to switch on, I had to constantly hold the button on for it to come on, half the time I did not know if it was on or not because the light did not come on.  I would have like it if the case stood still but it just kept on rolling over.  I sent it back for a full refund

reviews.title: Not sure if it works
reviews.text: I’m really not sure if this sanitizing feature truly works. But it is a great case for travel. It comes charged as well, it does make me feel better that it has a sanitizing option, but I can’t say for certain it does anything to actually sanitize it.

reviews.title: Finally!

reviews.title: Keep your toothbrush sanitized

reviews.title: No good
reviews.text:
I ordered this for my son, and he loved it so much! He had fun brushing his teeth and did such a good job.
For like 2 weeks.
The battery is not waterproofed, so it is all getting wet every time you brush and rinse. So now it doesn't work. I thought it was just a dead battery, but nope. It all got wet and is ruined.
I'm super disappointed. You would think something like a toothbrush would be better sealed to prevent such a thing from happening. And of course, it died right after the return deadline.
Save yourself the money and drama of explaining to a toddler why he can't use his Blippi brush anymore.

reviews.title: good value
reviews.text: for my grandson he loved them

reviews.title: Works as needed.
reviews.text: You get what you pay for. These kids toothbrushes aren’t expensive and what you receive is good value for the money. Yes, some of the toothbrushes get loosened fibers over time, but we don’t keep them long enough to reach that point. The more aggressive of a brusher you are, the quicker you need to replace them. I find that they don’t last 3 months with good consistent brushing, as the quality declines with usage. Overall I’m happy with these for my son, just remember to switch them out within three months. The design is a great bonus for kids that enjoy HotWheels!

reviews.title: good purchase
reviews.text: good purchase but if you have a toddler who likes to chew on the bristles then you’ll realize the bristles can come out.. so just watch out

reviews.title: Good cheap toddler toothbrushes.
reviews.text: My toddler destroys and flattens bristles. These are cheap enough that It doesn’t break the bank when she needs a new one every few weeks. Bristles also don’t fall out. Will order again.

reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: These are HARD
reviews.text:
UPDATE: these ended up making my tongue bleed quite a bit. Why you’d need this type of brush for your mouth… I have no idea. Can’t return cause I used it. Otherwise I would , so I think I’ll use them for a teeny bonfire.

I will preface this by saying I use an electric oral b cross action toothbrush . I got these to brush my tongue . And the toothbrush is HARD. Like it made my tongue bleed. Idk who is using this for their teeth lol be careful if u are. It worked amazing for the purpose I got it for but just be cautious.

title: CORATED Toddler Toothbrush U-Shaped Kids Toothbrush Baby Soft Silicone Toothbrush Manual Training Toothbrush Infant 360° Oral Teeth Cleaning Design for Kids 2-7 Years Old (Doughnut Brown)
features: 【SAFETY MATERIAL】Different from ordinary toothbrushes, U-shaped toothbrushes use safe food-grade silicone material, which is soft and comfortable, has no peculiar smell, and without BPA. Mothers are more at ease to protect the baby's oral health.

【360° EFFECTIVE CLEANING】The unique U-shaped toothbrush head design is more suitable for Toddler's tooth structure. It fits each tooth perfectly and provides adequate cleaning and protection for your child's teeth.

【FUN&CUTE TOOTHBRUSH】The cute rainbow and doughnut patterns, and the creative U-shaped toothbrush make it easy and fun for children to brush their teeth. This helps your child be willing to brush their teeth longer and even develop healthy brushing habits, say goodbye to tooth decay.

【EXTRA SOFT TOOTHBRUSH】The silicone bristles is soft on children's teeth and gums, clean teeth gently and massage baby’s delicate gums. The Soft brush head help get into hard to reach areas and effectively and remove stains.

Toothbrush size: 85mm/3.35", Brush head size: 1.96"*0.98". Specially designed for the teeth of toddlers aged 2-7.

reviews.title: Nifty toothbrush, brush all the teeth at once
reviews.text:
Just add toothpaste, stick in mouth and brush side to side. Gets all the teeth clean at the same time. Very nifty. The brush head is a little flexible, so it can adjust to her jaw shape. I think the only thing that concerns me is that this is not really teaching the kid how to brush with a regular toothbrush. For now, it's really useful since she gets impatient with brushing teeth.
It came with a spare brush head which just pops on to the small metal rod. It's also very cute.

reviews.title: Simple and easy to use
reviews.text: This little toothbrush is pretty cheap in comparison to others similar to it, but it also doesn’t have any special functions. It just works as is, you put tooth paste between the bristles and then it’s used manually. No vibrations or flashing colors, but it does have a super cute design and hey at least it doesn’t need to be charged because those cords always seem to get lost too lol. Great price point for a bit more of a detailed, deep clean for kiddos’ teeth. Recommend!

title: Oral-B iO Series 4 Electric Toothbrush with (1) Brush Head, Rechargeable, Black
description: The iO is Oral-B’s best technology: Clinically Proven 500% More Plaque Removal Along Gumline versus a manual toothbrush. The i04 coaches you to a perfect clean. This is real time personalized coaching. The accompanying App shows your daily brushing report. Having 4 Brush Modes (Daily Clean, Whiten, Sensitive, and Super Sensitive) Oral-B is on your team for your everyday brushing task. A Round head and gentle micro-vibrations, the Magnetic interaction delivers smooth, harmonious motion through a Synchronized cleaning action (micro-vibrations synced with oscillations). A Built-in-2-Minute Timer ensures an even easier experience, helping you get an optimal clean on all your teeth. The Oral-B's quadrant timer breaks the two minutes up into four 30-second intervals to clean each quadrant of your mouth; we keep the time, so you don’t have to. Delivering the perfect pressure is done by having a Pressure Sensor. The Pressure Sensor Indicates optimal cleaning pressure and warns of over pressure. With an accompanying travel case, you’ll have a fresh clean everywhere you go. We’re with you on your next trip or even your mid-day on-the go brushing! Best of all, it is brought to you by Oral-B—the #1 brand used by dentists worldwide.* *Based on surveys of a representative worldwide sample of dentists carried out for P&G regularly.Do not use on children under age 3. Replace brush (head) every 3 months or sooner if brush head becomes worn.

Clinically proven to remove 500% more plaque along the gumline vs. a regular manual toothbrush

reviews.title: Works Great On Braces, My Kids Like Them, Brush Cover
reviews.text:
I got this Ortho Standard 33 orthodontic toothbrush almost two months ago and decided to get this value pack. My kids have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, and since using these it’s been better. I don’t notice food stuck or buildup on their brackets.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles or handles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help brush teeth better while having braces.

reviews.title: My Kids Like It, The Brush Head Cover is A Bonus
reviews.text:
I got the Ortho Standard 33 for my kids because they have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, I was hoping these would help due to the design of them.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help better brush teeth while having braces.

reviews.title: It works great
reviews.text: This toothbrush works great to clean around those brackets!

reviews.title: Good design for brushing with braces
reviews.text: I got these for my young adult son who wears braces, and he is very pleased with them. The size of the brush is just right for maneuvering around teeth and braces. The bristles are angled which makes it helpful to thoroughly remove food and tartar for someone with braces. I like that there is a pack of 6, so that there is always a new toothbrush available when the current one needs to be replaced.

title: EcoDent Tooth Powder Daily Care, Baking Soda Tooth Powder, Fluoride Free, Low Abrasion with Baking Soda, Tooth Powder for Toothbrush, Original Mint Tooth Powder (3 Pack-2 Oz Ea)
description:
Eco-Dent DailyCare Mint Toothpowder is made with baking soda, minerals, peppermint oil, and myrrh. It provides an economical way to support your oral health.
The effervescent formula reaches all areas of your mouth to clean deeply and freshen your breath with every use. Easy to apply with your toothbrush, the low abrasion formula protects delicate tooth enamel while delivering the legendary cleaning power of baking soda.
The tooth powder contains no fluoride, SLS, parabens, artificial sweeteners, colors, and is cruelty free and vegan friendly.
features: EFFERVESCENT TOOTHPOWDER: Eco Dent tooth powder delivers a deep cleaning action to your mouth while neutralizing acids.
GENTLE TOOTH POWDER: Our low abrasion powder for cleaning teeth is gentle on enamel and may be used alone or sprinkled over toothpaste.
TIME-TESTED INGREDIENTS: Our original mint tooth powder contains baking soda, minerals, and essential oils to support your oral care needs and freshen your breath.
ECONOMICAL & LONG LASTING: Our travel size toothpaste powder is a convenient and economical oral care solution that lasts for up to 200 brushings.
PREMIUM ORAL CARE: Eco-Dent DailyCare Baking Soda Toothpowder is used and recommended by dentists, oral surgeons, and periodontists.

I've used this product for many years. Took a few brushes to get used to the salty baking powder taste, but it's been smooth sailing ever since... And no cavities!

Keep in mind, it has no fluoride so if you need fluoride like I do, I mix this with crest for a bright shiny smile.

description: Initio Electric Toothbrush for adults adopts advanced technology by providing 40,000 high-speed vibrations per minute and effectively removing all teeth stains! Brush in the shower as this unit is waterproof up to IPX7 standard. Initio Electric Toothbrush for adults provides 8 famous DuPont brush heads for over 2 years of using. Each brush head comes with a protective cover to keep it clean and hygienic! Lastly, we provide you with a one-year warranty against any defects or issues you may have with the electric toothbrush. It can be your choice for Christmas, New Year Mother's Day and Valentine's Day gifts.
features: 40,000 STROKES PER MINUTE & 5 BRUSHING MODES - Initio rechargeable electric toothbrush for adults with advanced technology provides 40,000 high-speed vibrations per minute to effectively remove stains! 5 High-Performance electric toothbrush modes (whitening, cleaning, polishing, massaging, sensitivity) to meet your varied oral needs and are suitable for any brushing purpose. Recommend sensitivity mode for kids.

2 MINUTES SMART TIMER & LONG LASTING BATTERY LIFE - This electric toothbrush built-in Timer with 2 minutes- auto shut-off and interval pausing every 30 seconds encourages a proper brushing habit. The rechargeable electric toothbrush for adults is powered by a safe and durable lithium battery that can last up to 45 days of brushing on a single full charge. With Initio electric toothbrush never worry about bringing your charger when you travel!

8 DUPONT BRUSH HEADS & TRAVEL CASE INCLUDE- Initio Electric Toothbrush for adults provides 8 DuPont brush heads for over 2 years of using. And the quality-made travel case is ideal for any trip and enable you to easily transport your electric toothbrush and brush heads wherever you go. A best choice for your home and travel!

LIGHTWEIGHT HANDLE DESIGN AND CONVENIENT CHARGING -The electric toothbrush is easy to hold and made with anti-slip material. The electric toothbrush can be charged anytime and anywhere with a USB cable. Plus, this electric toothbrush has a low battery indicator and auto shut off when the unit is fully charged to prevent battery from being overcharged and damaged. Please kindly know that the package DO NOT include the AC Adaptor.

IPX7 WATERPROOF - This electric toothbrush is a water-resistant unit up to IPX7 standard. The entire toothbrush can be safely rinsed with water. You may also safely brush with it in the bath or shower. Initio sonic electric toothbrush is also a perfect Valentine's Day gift.

reviews.title: LOVE THESE BABY TOOTHBRUSHES!
reviews.text: I love everything from this brand. Mushie has the best baby silicone products and I wish I had bought the other products from Amazon so that I can write these reviews! I've been skeptical about using the cotton baby toothbrushes because I don't want any lint staying in my baby's mouth or it slipping off and be a potential choking hazard. This silicone toothbrush fits perfectly on my finger and makes it so much easier to brush his teeth rather than using a toothbrush and worrying about scraping the roof of his mouth. It's soft all around and has a silicone brush side to brush and a bumpy side for better gum stimulation. It comes in a pack of two and this brand has various modern colors. I highly recommend this product for infant brushing!
